title: CT10 static tactic graph — Default refinement
description: Concrete static-graph schema for CT10 (Default refinement). It requires the complete 17-node array in fixed source order from CT10.N01 through CT10.N17, with exact node IDs, ordinals, and roles; all remaining graph data must satisfy the generic tactic specification.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for the CT10 (Default refinement) tactic specification; must equal "CT10".

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT10.N01, "Definition — surviving residual class C", in CT10 (Default refinement); must equal "CT10.N01".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT10.N01, "Definition — surviving residual class C"; must equal the integer 1.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT10.N01, "Definition — surviving residual class C"; must equal "definition", meaning this node defines an exact object, predicate, or invariant used later.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT10.N02, "Recovery entry — payloads from CT2, CT6, CT7, CT8, CT9, CT11, CT14, CT17", in CT10 (Default refinement); must equal "CT10.N02".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT10.N02, "Recovery entry — payloads from CT2, CT6, CT7, CT8, CT9, CT11, CT14, CT17"; must equal the integer 2.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT10.N02, "Recovery entry — payloads from CT2, CT6, CT7, CT8, CT9, CT11, CT14, CT17"; must equal "recovery", meaning this node records and repairs missing data or a missing supporting rule.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT10.N03, "Definition — finite refinement label ell:C→", in CT10 (Default refinement); must equal "CT10.N03".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT10.N03, "Definition — finite refinement label ell:C→"; must equal the integer 3.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT10.N03, "Definition — finite refinement label ell:C→"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT10.N04, "Scope candidate — infinite refinement alphabet — scope audit", in CT10 (Default refinement); must equal "CT10.N04".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT10.N04, "Scope candidate — infinite refinement alphabet — scope audit"; must equal the integer 4.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT10.N04, "Scope candidate — infinite refinement alphabet — scope audit"; must equal "scope_audit", meaning this node records a candidate scope obstruction for audit, not as a proved fact.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT10.N05, "Lemma — label classes exhaust C", in CT10 (Default refinement); must equal "CT10.N05".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT10.N05, "Lemma — label classes exhaust C"; must equal the integer 5.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT10.N05, "Lemma — label classes exhaust C"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT10.N06, "Lemma — supported exchanges are finite inside each label class", in CT10 (Default refinement); must equal "CT10.N06".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT10.N06, "Lemma — supported exchanges are finite inside each label class"; must equal the integer 6.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT10.N06, "Lemma — supported exchanges are finite inside each label class"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT10.N07, "Classification theorem — what happens in one label class?", in CT10 (Default refinement); must equal "CT10.N07".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT10.N07, "Classification theorem — what happens in one label class?"; must equal the integer 7.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT10.N07, "Classification theorem — what happens in one label class?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT10.N08, "Proposition — label class is empty", in CT10 (Default refinement); must equal "CT10.N08".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT10.N08, "Proposition — label class is empty"; must equal the integer 8.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT10.N08, "Proposition — label class is empty"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT10.N09, "C5 — label class closed", in CT10 (Default refinement); must equal "CT10.N09".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT10.N09, "C5 — label class closed"; must equal the integer 9.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT10.N09, "C5 — label class closed"; must equal "certificate", meaning this node is a terminal closure or contradiction certificate.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT10.N10, "Payload lemma — class exchange or response/type datum", in CT10 (Default refinement); must equal "CT10.N10".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT10.N10, "Payload lemma — class exchange or response/type datum"; must equal the integer 10.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT10.N10, "Payload lemma — class exchange or response/type datum"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT10.N11, "Routing theorem — class result", in CT10 (Default refinement); must equal "CT10.N11".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT10.N11, "Routing theorem — class result"; must equal the integer 11.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT10.N11, "Routing theorem — class result"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT10.N12, "CT 7 — exchange", in CT10 (Default refinement); must equal "CT10.N12".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT10.N12, "CT 7 — exchange"; must equal the integer 12.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT10.N12, "CT 7 — exchange"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT10.N13, "CT 3 — external types", in CT10 (Default refinement); must equal "CT10.N13".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT10.N13, "CT 3 — external types"; must equal the integer 13.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT10.N13, "CT 3 — external types"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT10.N14, "Lemma — missing-datum extraction", in CT10 (Default refinement); must equal "CT10.N14".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT10.N14, "Lemma — missing-datum extraction"; must equal the integer 14.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT10.N14, "Lemma — missing-datum extraction"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT10.N15, "Definition — promoted invariant", in CT10 (Default refinement); must equal "CT10.N15".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT10.N15, "Definition — promoted invariant"; must equal the integer 15.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT10.N15, "Definition — promoted invariant"; must equal "definition", meaning this node defines an exact object, predicate, or invariant used later.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT10.N16, "Routing theorem — new invariant type", in CT10 (Default refinement); must equal "CT10.N16".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT10.N16, "Routing theorem — new invariant type"; must equal the integer 16.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT10.N16, "Routing theorem — new invariant type"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT10.N17, "CT 15 — rank forcing", in CT10 (Default refinement); must equal "CT10.N17".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT10.N17, "CT 15 — rank forcing"; must equal the integer 17.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT10.N17, "CT 15 — rank forcing"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodes.description: Required complete node specification for CT10 (Default refinement); must contain exactly 17 generic node objects in source order from CT10.N01 through CT10.N17, with the fixed identity, ordinal, and role declared at each position.
